name: Mexican Patties
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Can green chiles, deseeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients, except cheese and the 2 green peppers, in a medium bowl until well blended.
3. Form meatballs, each containing a 1-inch cube of Jack cheese at the center.
4. Cut the green peppers into quarters and remove seeds.
5. Place each meatball into the center of a pepper.
6. Bake for 20-30 minutes.
Serves 4-6.
